payload.answer: Direct admin SQL inspection is unavailable because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. I should not run or imply results for `SELECT * FROM memory_cards` when the debug SQL feature is disabled.
citations: Input command: /brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards

entity_resolution.reason: This is a debug/admin SQL request about system state, not a durable user fact to store or resolve.

details: No memory state was read from memory_cards.
No durable memory was created or modified.

repair_options: Set BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=true in the appropriate environment and retry the admin SQL command.
Use supported non-SQL Brain inspection/debug commands if available.
Check application logs or admin configuration to confirm whether debug SQL is intentionally disabled.
